'''DFS-327''' was a [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|''Vulture''-class starfighter]] assigned to the [[Lucrehulk-class battleship/Legends|Lucrehulk-class battleship]] [[Saak'ak/Legends|''Saak'ak'']].

It was programmed for battleship defense. It would not pursue enemy starfighters once repelled, but could disable vital systems on attacking capital starships.
